titleStmt.title: SII 5.694: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 694. (A.R. No. 130 of 1895). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE MAHALINGASVAMIN TEMPLE AT TIRUVIDAIMARUDUR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu malara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa tannirupatumalar mannavar cūṭa manniya Urimai yil maṇimuṭi cūṭic ceṅkol ceṉṟu tic[ Ai toṟum vaḷa] ṟpa veṅkali nīṅki meyyaṟan taḻai ppak kaliṅka miriyak kaṭala malai naṭātti valaṅko ḷāḻivarai Ūḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟkīḻ mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum vīrasiṁ hāsa nattu vīṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya kopparakecari
patma rāṉa Uṭai yār śrīvikra macoḻade vaṟku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭut tiruviṭai marutuṭai yār koyilil vīracoḻaaṇuk na Āṭkoṇṭānāna Arikularājamārāyan candrādi ttaval Uṭai yār tiruviṭai marutuṭai yār tirukkaṟṟaḷiyil māṇikkakkūttaṟku Amāvāsi toṟum tiruvamutu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuviṉavai yiṟṟukkum caṭṭiccoṟṟuk
kum Amāvāsi Oṉṟukku nellu Aiñkuṟuṇi Irunāḻikku O(r)rāṭṭai kku nellu Aiñkalaney mukkuṟuṇiyum tevar kaṭamai kku Acal nilam varicai ppaṭi munpu māttāl nellu Aṟukalattil cempātiyāl nellu Aiñkalaney mukkuṟuṇiyum Āka nellup patin kalane tūṇip patakku yāṇṭu Aiñcāvatuvarai payiṟ celaviṉṟiyey kollaiyāy kiṭanta tiruviṭai marutu
uḷḷūril catācivanmayakkalil naṭuvil vaḻikku meṟku Īraṅkoḷḷi kālceyyil vaṭatalaiyil kollai nilam Orumā mukkāṇiyum Aiñcāvatuvarai payiṟcelaviṉṟiyey kiṭantamai yil Ivan tan sva m Iṭṭut tirutti nivan=ta ttukku nellu Aiñkalaney mukkuṟuṇiyum tevarkaṭamai kku nellu Aiñkalaney mukkuṟuṇiyum Āka nellup patin
kalaney tūṇip patakkum Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum Iruppatāka viṭṭa nilam kuḻi nūṟṟeḻupattaiñcināl nilam Orumā mukkāṇiyum viṭṭatu . meṟpaṭiyān candrādi- ttavala Uṭai yār tiruviṭai marutuṭai yāṟkup palicai cekuttu Oru tirumañcanakkuṭam vai kka śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkina kācu Oṉṟu Itu panmā heśvara rakṣai ...
Digital edition of SII 5.694 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
